W • WGSS - Women, Gender and Sexuality Studies (p. 903)

WMST - Women's Studies (p. 906)

AASP443 Blacks and the Law (3 Credits) The relationship between black Americans and the law, particularly criminal law, criminal institutions and the criminal justice system. Examines historical changes in the legal status of blacks and changes in the causes of racial disparities in criminal involvement and punishments. Prerequisite: HIST255, AASP202, or AASP100; or permission of BSOS- African American Studies department.
